verses.1: This is the word that came to Jeremiah from the LORD:
verses.2: “This is what the LORD, the God of Israel, says: ‘Write in a book all the words that I have spoken to you.
verses.3: For behold, the days are coming, declares the LORD, when I will restore from captivity My people Israel and Judah, declares the LORD. I will restore them to the land that I gave to their fathers, and they will possess it.’”
verses.4: These are the words that the LORD spoke concerning Israel and Judah.
verses.5: Yes, this is what the LORD says:
verses.12: For this is what the LORD says:
verses.18: This is what the LORD says:
